name: messages-for-ai
description: AI proposes, you approve. Local menubar app + MCPs for iMessage and WhatsApp: Claude drafts, you hold-to-fire in the menubar. A post-onboarding walkthrough verifies Claude can reach each MCP, and a persistent Status pane lets you re-run the checks on demand. Full audit log under ~/.messages-mcp/send-audit.log. Requires Messages for AI.app installed from GitHub Releases.
